title: Zadie Moon - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Zadie Moon - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Zadie Moon
Align Student
MS in Computer Science ’25
Oakland Campus
When Zadie Moon tried an Intro to Computer Science class in her junior year of undergrad, it was the first time she’d ever felt excited about her homework. Now pursuing her master’s through the Align program, the support she’s received from her professors has helped her feel at home in this new field.
Entering into CS when you don’t have a CS background can be really challenging. Luckily the professors here have been super supportive and understanding that a lot of us come from different backgrounds and don’t have knowledge in the concepts that we’re learning. They present them in a way that’s super understandable and they work with you when you don’t know what to do
Zadie Moon, Align MSCS ’25
